Name: Tanglin Trust School
Tagline: Tanglin Trust is a Private, Not-for-Profit, British-based International School in Singapore for Students age 3 to 18 years with IB and A Level at Sixth Form. Awarded International School of Year 2023
About: Established in 1925, Tanglin Trust School is the oldest British international school in Southeast Asia. Tanglin provides the English National Curriculum with an international perspective to children from 3 to 18 years in Singapore.
Philosophy: Tanglin Trust School in Singapore has a long tradition of providing British-based learning with an international perspective. At Tanglin we strive to make every individual feel valued, happy and successful.
Outcomes: These fantastic results are a credit to the students who have been rewarded for their considerable hard work and effort.
Admissions: Applications may be submitted up to three years prior to the desired year of entry. Our review process begins September before intended year of entry.
Quote: We are the first school in Asia to be awarded a Curiosity Approach® accredited status.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Tanglin Trust School's educators are highly qualified, many holding advanced degrees and UK teaching certifications. They employ a student-centered approach, fostering critical thinking and creativity through innovative teaching methods.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers comprehensive pastoral care, including dedicated counselors and a robust house system, ensuring students' emotional and social needs are met. Regular wellbeing workshops and activities promote a supportive community environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: Tanglin Trust School offers a rigorous curriculum, integrating the English National Curriculum with IGCSE and A-Level qualifications, emphasizing a holistic educational approach. Students benefit from a broad range of subjects, including arts and sciences.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Tanglin Trust School consistently achieve high academic results, with many gaining entry to prestigious universities worldwide. The school's alumni have distinguished themselves in various fields, reflecting its strong academic foundation.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The school boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including science laboratories, art studios, and a swimming pool, supporting a diverse range of extracurricular activities. Cutting-edge technology enhances learning experiences across all disciplines.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Tanglin Trust School employs regular assessments and feedback mechanisms to ensure continuous student progress. Parents receive detailed reports and updates through parent-teacher meetings and an online portal, maintaining transparency and engagement.

Name: Overseas Family School
Tagline: Join top IB international school in Singapore. Multicultural. No entrance exams. All year enrolment. Located at the East District of Singapore.

Name: Singapore American School
Tagline: Singapore American School, a private pre-k to grade 12 school in Singapore, focuses on growth, development, and cultural awareness. Discover SAS!
About: At Singapore American School, we are committed to providing a culture of exceptional care which sets high standards and utilizes best practices in prevention and response to harm. When children are being impacted by harm inside or outside of school, we work from international guidance on the rights of children, local legislation on child welfare, and best safeguarding practices globally to inform our policies and procedures.
Philosophy: Child safeguarding is a big umbrella. It refers to the actions we take on behalf of children and community members to promote wellbeing, protect human rights, promote healthy development, and reduce or mitigate the risk of harm to children.
Outcomes: Singapore American School prepares students for global citizenship and academic excellence, with a strong emphasis on cultural awareness and personal growth.

Name: Singapore Swimming Club

With facilities like Olympic-sized pools, a 10-lane bowling centre, and 9 F&B outlets, there’s something for everyone!

Name: The Tanglin Club
Tagline: Founded in 1865, the Tanglin Club is Singapore’s leading private members’ club with over 4,000 members from more than 70 countries. The Club offers a diverse range of social and sporting amenities in
About: The opening of the Suez Canal in 1869 and the advent of steamers resulted in a travel revolution. The small port founded by Sir Thomas Stamford Raffles, the founder of Singapore, developed into a thriving trading centre, and the everyday life of the British settlement had become more sophisticated, and exclusively European.
Philosophy: It is not known how the name 'Tanglin' originated but as there are many places in Malaysia named after trees, it is possible that the Tanglin Club was named after the Saraca Tree aka 'Tanglin Tree'. A commemorative Tanglin Tree was planted in the grounds of the present clubhouse in 1990 to mark the Club's 125th anniversary.
Outcomes: The Tanglin Club provides a prestigious environment for networking, socializing, and engaging in diverse recreational activities. Members enjoy exclusive access to world-class facilities and events.
Admissions: Membership is by invitation or application, subject to approval by the Club's committee. Prospective members may need endorsements from existing members.

Philosophy: The Early Admission Exercise (EAE) is an aptitude-based admissions exercise open to graduating O-Level students, final-year Nitec and Higher Nitec students from the Institute of Technical Education and graduating Integrated Programme (IP)/International Baccalaureate (IB) Year 4 students. This exercise allows students to apply for and receive conditional offers for admission to LASALLE prior to receiving their final grades.

It was while working on secondment as the Director of Marketing for the Singapore Arts Festival that Dr Venka Purushothaman, recently appointed President of LASALLE College of the Arts, says his interest was piqued in doctorate studies.

Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is tracked through regular assessments and feedback sessions, ensuring continuous improvement and adaptation to individual needs. Stakeholders receive detailed reports on program effectiveness and participant development.

Name: ReDefine Wellness
Tagline: ellness Personal Therapy Therapist Training Contact Us View Schedule Featured Workshops Balance your energies, heal your emotions and manage your mind.
About: Ascend Reiki is a Reiki that is inspired by Kundalini Reiki and Kundalini Yoga. Ascend Reiki is an energy therapy that works with the body’s own remarkable healing capabilities.
Philosophy: There are so many alternative healing methods, what makes Ascend Reiki different from them? Ascend Reiki awaken your awareness and enhance your ability to examine certain attitudes, behaviors and emotional habits.
Outcomes: ReDefine Wellness helps individuals balance energies, heal emotions, and manage their minds through Ascend Reiki and mindfulness practices.
Admissions: Interested individuals can contact ReDefine Wellness through their website to inquire about programs and schedule a consultation.
Quote: Elevate your inner energy and embrace holistic well-being for a balanced and thriving life.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: ReDefine Wellness employs certified Reiki Masters and mindfulness coaches with extensive experience in energy healing and meditation practices. Their team is adept at guiding clients through personalized wellness journeys with a holistic approach.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: ReDefine Wellness offers personalized support through one-on-one sessions and group workshops to enhance emotional resilience and mental clarity. They foster a nurturing community that encourages open dialogue and personal growth.
Performance.Academic Integration: ReDefine Wellness integrates mindfulness and energy healing into its curriculum, emphasizing experiential learning and self-awareness. Their programs are designed to cultivate emotional intelligence and stress management skills.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: ReDefine Wellness clients have reported significant improvements in emotional balance and stress reduction, enhancing their professional and personal lives. Many participants have successfully integrated mindfulness practices into their daily routines.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: ReDefine Wellness features serene meditation rooms and dedicated spaces for Reiki sessions, equipped with comfortable seating and calming ambiance. They utilize modern technology to facilitate virtual wellness workshops and consultations.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: ReDefine Wellness maintains client progress through regular feedback sessions and personalized assessments. They ensure continuous improvement by adapting programs based on participant feedback and wellness goals.

Name: Core Collective
Tagline: We are a collaborative fitness & wellness community and co working centre here in Singapore. Visit us today and find out more!
About: Core Collective is committed to growing centres of excellence where the top fitness and wellness professionals collaborate to deliver the best service and results for our customers, all under one roof. Our thoughtfully curated locations offer a variety of bespoke environments, from exclusive gym spaces and fully equipped Pilates studios to private treatment and consultation rooms.
Philosophy: Pregnancy is an incredible journey, but it often comes with physical challenges that can take a toll on your body. Kate from Milestone Physiotherapy shares that with the right guidance and targeted physiotherapy, you can recover faster, regain strength, and move through pregnancy and postpartum with confidence and ease.
Outcomes: Core Collective fosters a collaborative environment for fitness and wellness, helping members achieve optimal health and well-being through expert guidance and tailored programs.
Admissions: Membership at Core Collective is open to all adults. Interested individuals can explore options and sign up through the website or by visiting the hub.
Quote: Elevate your potential by uniting with experts in a sanctuary of holistic fitness and wellness excellence.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Core Collective's professionals hold certifications from renowned institutions like NASM and ACE, ensuring high standards in fitness and wellness. Their diverse expertise includes physiotherapy, personal training, and nutrition, catering to varied client needs.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Core Collective offers a supportive community with access to wellness workshops and personalized guidance from experts. This holistic approach ensures members' mental and physical well-being are prioritized and nurtured effectively.
Performance.Academic Integration: Core Collective's programs emphasize experiential learning through tailored fitness and wellness workshops. While not offering traditional academic qualifications, they focus on practical skill development and personal growth for adult members.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Members have successfully transitioned into careers in fitness and wellness, leveraging Core Collective's expert-led programs. The hub's holistic approach fosters tangible improvements in health and professional development outcomes.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Core Collective boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including fully equipped Pilates studios and private treatment rooms. These bespoke environments are designed to enhance the fitness and wellness experience for all members.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is meticulously tracked through personalized assessments and regular feedback sessions at Core Collective. This ensures members receive tailored guidance and maintain accountability towards their wellness goals.

Name: Psych Connect
Tagline: We have internationally trained and recognized licensed clinical psychologists in Singapore for the intervention and assessment of your child’s needs. Visit us on our website or call us @ +65 6493 024
About: Even experienced clinicians sometimes find themselves stuck or unsure about how to proceed in a case or in their practices. Having another professional think about your cases and join you in exploring your own experiences while treating others can be enormously beneficial to your own professional growth, to your clients, and in maintaining a high level of ethical boundaries.
Philosophy: Psych Connect focuses on individualized care, combining evidence-based practices with a compassionate approach to support mental health and development.
Outcomes: Clients experience improved mental well-being and developmental progress through tailored interventions and assessments.
Admissions: Contact Psych Connect via their website or phone to discuss your needs and schedule an initial consultation.
Quote: In shared exploration, we find clarity and growth, transforming uncertainties into pathways of healing and understanding.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Psych Connect employs clinicians with advanced degrees in psychology and counseling, including certifications in child and adolescent therapy. Their team combines years of clinical experience with specialized training in evidence-based therapeutic techniques.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Psych Connect offers comprehensive pastoral care through individualized counseling sessions and group workshops, fostering a supportive community. Their approach emphasizes emotional resilience and mental health awareness for holistic student development.
Performance.Academic Integration: While not an academic institution, Psych Connect integrates therapeutic interventions with educational support, enhancing learning outcomes for neurodiverse students. They collaborate with schools to tailor strategies that complement academic curricula.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Psych Connect's tailored interventions have led to significant improvements in clients' academic performance and personal development. Many clients successfully transition to mainstream educational settings and achieve personal milestones.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Psych Connect features state-of-the-art therapy rooms equipped with sensory tools and technology to support diverse therapeutic needs. Their facilities are designed to create a calming and engaging environment for clients.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Psych Connect conducts regular progress reviews and provides detailed feedback to parents and stakeholders. They utilize structured assessments and maintain open communication to ensure continuous improvement and accountability.

Name: Singapore Raffles Music College
Tagline: SRMC offers a diverse range of music, dance, and arts education programs. Explore diploma and degree courses designed to nurture creativity and artistic growth.
About: Your ultimate launchpad into the realms of the Creative Arts. Since our kickoff in 2001, we've been on a mission to redefine excellence in arts education.
Philosophy: Students gain practical, hands-on experience by working on real-world projects, bridging the gap between academic learning and industry practice. Through collaborations with external partners and in-house productions, SRPS helps students refine their craft and develop industry-ready skills.
Outcomes: Graduates are equipped with industry-ready skills and practical experience, preparing them for successful careers in the creative arts.
Admissions: Prospective students must submit an application form and attend an audition or interview to assess their suitability for the program.
Quote: SRMC’s piano rooms can be used for one-to-one music lessons, piano/vocal practices, and music exams preparation.

Performance.Academic Integration: Picture yourself flowing from one creative space to another - from vibrant Classrooms where ideas collide and form masterpieces, to the Multimedia Room where technology meets creativity. Feel the rhythm in our Dance Studios, and let your melody unfold in the Pop Music Studio.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: SRMC’s dance studios are fully equipped with full-length mirrors and ballet barres, suitable for dance/theatre lessons, rehearsals, performances, and examinations.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: From the moment you step into our Recital Studio and Recording Studio, you're not just entering spaces; you're stepping into the future of artistry, surrounded by the latest tech that's waiting to capture your next big idea.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Singapore Raffles Music College employs instructors with advanced degrees in music and arts, many of whom are internationally recognized performers and educators. Faculty members hold certifications from prestigious institutions, ensuring high-quality, industry-relevant training.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The college offers comprehensive pastoral care, including access to professional counselling services and peer support groups. Regular workshops on stress management and mental health are conducted to promote a balanced student life.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through regular assessments and portfolio reviews, ensuring alignment with industry standards. Feedback is communicated through detailed reports, fostering transparency and continuous improvement in educational outcomes.

Name: School of the Arts Singapore
Tagline: emic curriculum, leading to the International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP) or the International Baccalaureate Career-Related Programme (IBCP).
About: SOTA’s educational philosophy celebrates creative experimentation, self-expression, and artistic discovery. Supported by MCCY and MOE, SOTA offers a unique pathway for young artists, to develop their full potential in both arts and academics.
Philosophy: Approaches learning and creating as intertwined endeavours, working individually and collaboratively Is motivated by the pleasure of discovery and expression, and the value it contributes to the world Is equipped with disciplinary knowledge, methods and forms, and flexibly integrates these to better engage with and respond to complexity At SOTA, we proudly embody our identity as a School, public Company Limited by Guarantee (CLG), and Institution of Public Character (IPC).
Outcomes: Regardless of their varied pursuits, our graduates continue to actively engage with and support the arts beyond their time at SOTA, demonstrating an appreciation and commitment to the arts. SOTA’s International Baccalaureate Career-related Programme (IBCP) is recognised by arts institutes and conservatories locally and internationally.
Admissions: Application to SOTA is via the Direct School Admission. Shortlisted applicants participate in the auditions conducted at our Talent Academy (TA) platform in June each year, where they will have the opportunity to show their portfolio of work.
Quote: We are calling for a new generation of artistic and creative learners, and cultural leaders. Watch this space for more information on our annual admissions process.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Student Development programmes in SOTA seeks to develop the affective character in our students. This involves nurturing their social-emotional skills, values, attitudes, and dispositions.
Performance.Academic Integration: Apart from their arts disciplines, SOTA students take academic subjects such as English Language & Critical thinking, Literature in English, Humanities, Mathematics, Mother Tongue Languages and Sciences.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: SOTA’s Specialised Arts Programmes aim to develop strong artistic capabilities through critical thinking skills, creative awareness, and discipline. Students enrolled in the school specialise in the specific art form they auditioned for.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: SOTA's faculty comprises experienced educators and practicing artists, many holding advanced degrees and certifications in arts education. They employ a student-centered approach, fostering creativity and critical thinking through personalized mentorship.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: SOTA graduates have secured placements in prestigious institutions like Juilliard and Central Saint Martins, reflecting the school's robust arts and academic training. Students frequently excel in international arts competitions, showcasing their talents globally.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: SOTA implements regular student progress reviews and personalized feedback sessions to ensure continuous development. The school maintains transparent communication with parents through detailed reports and stakeholder meetings, upholding high educational standards.
